query: On-call engineer 'u_9981' (role: senior-engineer) requests emergency access to production database 'db-payments-primary' to investigate a live P1 incident.

policy_registry.POL-501: Production database access requires DBA role or active incident ticket.
policy_registry.POL-502: Mission-critical resources require dual approval except during declared P1 incidents.
policy_registry.POL-503: Emergency access grants must be logged and reviewed within 24 hours.

gold_output.reason: Active P1 incident ticket satisfies POL-501; P1 exception waives dual approval (POL-502); POL-503 requires post-access review within 24 hours
